name: Employee Share Option Exercise
description: Records ESOS/ESPP/share option exercise events. Taxable gain (ITA 1967 s.25, Public Ruling 1/2021) is auto-calculated as (market_price - exercise_price) x shares_exercised.

fields.label: Grant Date
fields.description: Date on which the share options were originally granted to the employee.

fields.label: Exercise Date
fields.description: Date on which the employee exercised the share options. The taxable gain is recognised in the year of exercise (ITA 1967 s.25).

fields.label: Scheme Name
fields.description: Name of the ESOS/ESPP/share option scheme (optional reference).

fields.label: Shares Exercised
fields.description: Number of shares exercised in this transaction.

fields.label: Exercise Price per Share (RM)
fields.description: The strike / option price per share at which the employee may purchase shares.

fields.label: Market Price on Exercise Date (RM)
fields.description: The fair market value per share on the date of exercise. Per Public Ruling No. 1/2021, this is the closing price on Bursa Malaysia (or equivalent).

fields.label: Taxable Gain (RM)
fields.description: Auto-calculated: (market_price_on_exercise - exercise_price) x shares_exercised. This amount is treated as employment income in the year of exercise and must be included in EA Form Section B10.
